title: Chewy Fresh Venezuelan Seafood Grill
description: This dish is a crowd-pleaser that features a mix of seafood, grilled to perfection with a hint of Venezuelan flavors. It's a great option for a quick dinner that's also macrobiotic-friendly.
instructions: Preheat a robata grill to medium-high heat.
In a bowl, mix together lime juice, olive oil, garlic, cilantro, and paprika smoked.
Add the shrimp, mussels, zucchini, and bell peppers to the bowl and toss to coat.
Thread the seafood onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Grill the seafood for 8-10 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Add the seafood stock to the grill and bring to a simmer.
Continue to grill for another 2-3 minutes, until the seafood is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Slice the zucchini and bell peppers into wedges and serve on the side.
Garnish with additional lime wedges if desired.
